item.title: Cute stuff
item.dc:creator: alicary

item.title: Cathedral, Mountain, Moon
item.description: https://twitter.com/apod/status/1739472978004660239 Just think of all the elements that had to come together to get this shot! The photographer has been trying to capture it for six years.
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Confused
item.description: Coworker murdered his fiancee and her two teenage daughters, one of whom was 8 months pregnant. He then drove into the countryside and shot himself. I cannot imagine any reason for killing the girls. He was my friend and never seemed the type. I apologize for venting. But the other coworkers keep 'what if?' about what caused this to happen. I'm overwhelmed that he murdered children.
item.dc:creator: bobgunrunnersmith

item.title: The owner of the house fed a fox that came to her door because it was hungry, and the next day the fox came with her whole family…

item.title: Merry Christmas ya filthy animals! I'm 75, give me a break. And it is Boxing Day so does that count?
item.description: Showing off one of the gifts I got from my wife, an artist. Told her I thought it was one of her best, so she gave it to me. I call it, "The Memory Tree." And kinda plug her gallery.
item.dc:creator: grandpasonlylivingheir

And my cake day!
Sorry no sources
Sorry for not cropping. Now I’m too lazy to fix it.

item.title: Cake day
item.description: Never actually posted about my cake day before, but may as well do it at least one. Not complaining about the Christmas selfies, I just chose an unfortunate date to make my imgur account.
item.dc:creator: MercyMei

item.title: It's my first cake day. Have randomness from my phone
item.description:
I like cheese
Pretty much my whole year actually
I hear this perfectly when I read it
I didn't know it was teqeeeeeuila
Skeeteth
Like, really like cheese
Bit more cheese
Bonus kitties! - angry Mordecai
My lovey Beans. Aka my Beanie baby
Festive beans
Mah beans
item.dc:creator: BurntChikkyNuggies

item.title: Removal of the 109-year-old Confederate Memorial in Arlington National Cemetery
item.dc:creator: CantStopPoppin

item.title: Good news for good dogs
item.description: With war, politics, and general negativity constantly flooding the news, this was nice to read! Edit: I'm sorry everyone is posting about how the dogs are probably going to be re-dumped. I understand it's a real concern but I thought this was a little bit of good news in a dark time. Guess not. https://www.cnn.com/2023/12/25/us/pennsylvania-adams-county-animal-shelter-empty?cid=ios_app
item.dc:creator: psychobeanz

item.title: Photographer Valerio Minato captures the moon setting behind a Mountain
item.description: Photo was taken in Turin, Italy. Seen are Mount Monviso and the Basilica of Superga.
item.dc:creator: DrForester

item.title: Came to work to find some of my belongings missing from the office. Had security check the cameras, and there's my boss, stealing my things.
item.description: I'm not sure how to go about reporting this to HR. My boss doesn't know that I know it was him. I don't feel comfortable going into work anymore. And the dick had the audacity to say he wasn't going to report it to the police and instead just go to the dean about it when I asked if we should call the cops. (We work on a campus).
item.dc:creator: Lyricalwordsmith
